tools.name: search_enforcement
tools.description: Full-text search across all 1,000+ Argus HQ FDA enforcement pages (warning letters, recalls, approvals, 483 inspections) by keyword, product name, or company name.

tools.name: get_company_history
tools.description: Every FDA warning letter, recall, approval, and 483 citation Argus HQ has recorded for a given company, by its Argus HQ company slug (e.g. "pfizer-inc").

tools.name: get_recall_by_lot
tools.description: Finds every FDA recall record that references a specific product lot number.

tools.name: get_warning_letter
tools.description: Direct lookup of an FDA warning letter. Accepts either the FDA reference number printed in the letter itself (e.g. "320-26-65") or the fda.gov URL slug ID for the letter.

tools.name: list_recent_actions
tools.description: The most recent published FDA warning letters, recalls, approvals, and 483 citations across all streams.
